summary: Plan-mode PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs are classified independently; one security-shaped PR is routed to central security handling; refs with unavailable live state are scoped needs_human due missing kind/updated_at from preflight.
